records.ety: [L. omittere, omissum; ob (see Ob- + mittere to cause to go, let go, send. See Mission.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Omitted; p. pr. & vb. n. Omitting.]

defs: To let go; to leave unmentioned; not to insert or name; to drop.
To forbear or fail to perform or to make use of; to leave undone; to neglect; to pass over.
quotes: Her father omitted nothing in her education that might make her the most accomplished woman of her age.
